title: Additional Information
description: Tell us about any special conditions so we can prepare the right treatments.

questions.label: Pre-vacuuming

options.label: No, I will handle
options.disclaimer: Please vacuum thoroughly before our crew arrives to avoid rescheduling.

questions.info: We bring commercial vacuums; skip this if you already plan to vacuum.

questions.label: Pet urine spots

options.label: 4 or more rooms
options.disclaimer: Heavy urine jobs may need UV inspection and could change the estimate on site.

questions.info: Helps us pack the right neutralizers and UV tools.

questions.label: Dark stain treatment (coffee, greese, dirt)

options.label: 10+ stains
options.disclaimer: Extensive spotting may require extra dwell time and a follow-up visit.

questions.info: Dark stains often need agitation and dwell time.

questions.label: Colorful stain treatment (drinks, markers, ink)

options.label: 7+ (to be quoted)
options.disclaimer: Color-transfer stains over 6 spots may need a site quote and cannot be guaranteed.

questions.info: Bright dyes sometimes need specialty spotting - estimate may adjust.

questions.label: Special instructions or additional details
questions.placeholder: Optional helpful notes (stains, urine areas, pet problem areas, or access)
questions.info: Share anything unique so we prep solutions, pads, or PPE.
